show running-config
config-file-header
amp-switch
CLI v1.0
!
vlan database
vlan 100-140,200-201
exit
hostname amp-switch
!
interface vlan 100
 name JAP_AMP_CONTROL
 ip address 172.27.0.1 255.255.0.0
!
interface vlan 101
 name JAP_AMP_TX_1
 ip address 172.27.1.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface vlan 102
 name JAP_AMP_TX_2
 ip address 172.27.2.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface GigabitEthernet1
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 100-101 untagged
 switchport general pvid 101
!
interface GigabitEthernet2
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 100,102 untagged
 switchport general pvid 100
!
amp-switch#
